ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th March 2026
ham.body:
Hi team,

Just a friendly reminder that the semester project submission is due on 15th March 2026. Please make sure your final report and presentation slides are uploaded to the portal by 11:59 PM on the same day.

If you need any clarification or have a last-minute query, feel free to ping me.

Thanks and good luck!

Best,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required on Your Account – IT Helpdesk Ticket #12345
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our automated security system has flagged suspicious activity on your corporate account. To prevent a possible suspension and keep your access uninterrupted, you must verify your credentials within the next 24 hours.

Please follow the steps below to complete the verification:
1. Click on the link provided and enter your employee ID and password.
2. Confirm the details shown on the screen.
3. Finish the verification process.

<URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary account lockout and potential data loss.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
